message:
🐛 Marketplace: include presets from registry.json (#1565)

The registry.json has two arrays: `items` (3 dashboards) and `presets`
(73 card-presets + themes). Only `items` was being read, so the
Marketplace page showed just 3 items instead of all 76.

Add `presets` to the MarketplaceRegistry interface and merge both
arrays when loading from fresh fetch or localStorage cache.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
